query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('offerLeads', 'appointments', 'campRegistrations') AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('age', 'gender', 'patientMessage') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xtgvXGdr7mxJSP.root --database HgGpRPs4xs9xrzjfX4xmFY --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('offerLeads', 'appointments', 'campRegistrations') AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('age', 'gender', 'patientMessage') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME;
stdout:
TABLE_NAME	COLUMN_NAME	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_TYPE
appointments	age	YES	int
appointments	gender	YES	enum('male','female')
appointments	patientMessage	YES	text
campRegistrations	age	YES	int
campRegistrations	gender	YES	enum('male','female')
campRegistrations	patientMessage	YES	text
offerLeads	age	YES	int
offerLeads	gender	NO	enum('male','female')
offerLeads	patientMessage	YES	text
